signals.reasoning: This trade is broken. The live BLUR long has gone from a positive peak around $1.21 to a current unrealized loss near $-0.50, retaining none of peak P&L, and the request flags it urgent. Even with a still-bullish mechanical board, this instance of the trade should be closed immediately.
BTC is liquid and stable, but the board still marks it no-trade and the edge is weak. Not where I would redeploy after cutting a failed position.
ETH is mildly constructive but still low-edge, with positive funding and a neutral board. No compelling reason to act.
SOL has modest positive trend, but funding remains positive and the board is still no-trade. Not strong enough to prioritize.
ZEC has real liquidity and strong recent momentum, but it is already stretched and funding is not supportive of a clean squeeze. Interesting, not first-choice.
MERL is moving, but the market is thin and the edge is still too mixed to justify a fresh position.
ZEN has a better profile than most midcaps here with decent momentum and only mild funding pressure, but it is still a watchlist-quality long rather than a priority trade.
DASH has solid price strength and volume, but the board remains neutral and funding is positive. It is tradable, just not better than the stronger squeeze names.
TURBO still has a real squeeze-continuation setup with strong momentum, negative funding, and high crowding. Confidence stays capped because liquidity is still thin and macro remains RED.
COMP is mildly constructive but still not decisive. The board is neutral and the liquidity/spread profile is only average.
TNSR remains one of the better fresh continuation longs with strong 24h expansion, negative funding, and a bullish trade flag. Macro still being RED keeps this at reduced-size conviction only.
